svg.text: • GPIO15 is strap pin (SPI boot) — 10kΩ pull-down ensures safe boot
• GPIO0, GPIO1, GPIO8, GPIO9, GPIO19 are spare for future expansion
• Do NOT apply 5V to any GPIO — ESP32 is 3.3V logic only
DIGITAL OUTPUTS — AO3400A N-Channel MOSFET Driver
GPIO16 data | on floating shelf in toilet
Single GPIO controls RGB colors + brightness
Fault latch: pump overcurrent | level sensor timeout | float switch stuck
